title: VeinMinerPro
description: High-performance, ore-only vein mining for modern  servers
body:
# ⛏️ VeinMinerPro
> **High-performance, ore-only vein mining for modern Paper/Spigot servers.**

VeinMinerPro is a lightweight utility designed for server owners who want the efficiency of chain-mining without the performance cost. Built on **Java 21**, it ensures your TPS stays at 20.0 while clearing entire ore veins in a single click.

---

### 🚀 Performance & Logic
* **Queue-Based BFS:** Optimized algorithm prevents server lag during large mining operations.
* **Smart Grouping:** Automatically connects Stone, Deepslate, and Nether ore variants.
* **Metadata Tracking:** Identifies player-placed blocks to prevent "storage mining" exploits.
* **Safety Buffer:** Automatically stops the process before your tool breaks (stops at 1 HP).

### 🛠️ Commands & Permissions
| Command | Description | Permission |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `/vm toggle` | Turn VeinMiner on/off | `veinminer.toggle` |
| `/vm reload` | Reload config.yml | `veinminer.reload` |
| `n/a` | Use the ability | `veinminer.use` |

---

### 💰 Support & Donations
If you enjoy this project and want to see more "Pro" features, consider supporting me!
[**Donate via PayPal: paypal.me/marbzy**](https://www.paypal.me/marbzy)

---

### 📦 Installation
1. Drop the jar into your `/plugins` folder.
2. Ensure you are running **Java 21** and **Paper/Spigot 1.20.1+**.
3. Configure your ore limits in `config.yml`.

---
